ReleaseNotes: Anti-thermal pulse sequencing: the laser now fires its pulses in an optimized order that spreads consecutive shots apart, reducing peak localized corneal heating during treatment. This changes only the firing sequence — the ablation profile, depth and pulse count are unchanged.

Clearer report figure: the treatment report and PDF now show "Max Ablation Ø" — the actual maximum ablation diameter measured from the ablation profile — in place of the previous "Optical Zone (with offset)" value. It matches the diameter and ring shown on the Ablation Profile map.
